description: Canonical registry of secret/config NAMES and their fan-out target mapping. NAMES AND TARGETS ONLY — never values. The single source of values is the gitignored local .env. `secrets-fanout.mjs` reads this manifest + .env and propagates values to each listed target. App-runtime secrets are the fan-out payload; operator-lane credentials authenticate the fan-out itself and are NEVER fanned into the app env (targets: []).

targets.vercel: Vercel project env (app + REST + MCP on one domain). Production + Preview + Development.
targets.github: GitHub Actions repository secrets (studio-jami/intercal) consumed by pipeline.yml / CD workflows.
targets.cloudrun: Cloud Run env for the heavy/on-demand pipeline path (Plan 07 W4). The pipeline runs as a Cloud Run JOB (intercal-pipeline), whose sensitive values are bound from Secret Manager (intercal-*) by scripts/ops/deploy-cloud-run.mjs, not via this fan-out's `gcloud run services update` (which targets a SERVICE). This target stays for a future Cloud Run SERVICE (e.g. an MCP fallback); set CLOUD_RUN_SERVICE in .env to activate it.

secrets.name: DATABASE_URL
secrets.note: Neon pooled connection string (app + pipeline).

secrets.name: DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED
secrets.note: Neon direct connection (migrations / long jobs).

secrets.name: STORAGE_PROVIDER
secrets.note: Object-storage adapter selector (s3).

secrets.name: S3_ENDPOINT
secrets.note: R2/S3 endpoint.

secrets.name: QUEUE_PROVIDER
secrets.note: Queue/cache adapter selector (redis|postgres).

secrets.name: REDIS_URL
secrets.note: Upstash redis:// URL.

secrets.name: UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL
secrets.note: Upstash REST endpoint (REST adapter path).

secrets.name: EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER
secrets.note: local fastembed by default (zero cost).

secrets.name: LLM_PROVIDER
secrets.note: vertex primary -> gemini fallback.

secrets.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
secrets.note: Gemini postpay fallback key.

secrets.name: GCLOUD_PROJECT_ID
secrets.note: Vertex project id (also used as VERTEX_PROJECT fallback).

secrets.name: GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY
secrets.note: Path/inline SA JSON for Vertex ADC in the pipeline runtime. NOTE: in CI this is provided as GCP_SA_KEY material; manifest tracks the runtime name only.

secrets.name: PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL
secrets.note: Public base URL the SDK/dashboard call.

secrets.name: INGEST_CRON
secrets.note: Pipeline cadence; defaults in code if unset (resource-budget.md).

secrets.name: VERCEL_TOKEN
secrets.note: Authenticates the Vercel fan-out itself. NEVER fanned into app env.

secrets.name: VERCEL_PROJECT_ID
secrets.note: Vercel project id used by the fan-out script.

secrets.name: GITHUB_REPO
secrets.note: owner/repo for `gh secret set`; the fan-out reads this, gh auth (PAT) authenticates.

secrets.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
secrets.note: Optional gh PAT override; gh CLI keyring auth used otherwise. Source-adapter read token, NOT a runtime payload.

secrets.name: GCP_SA_KEY
secrets.note: Service-account JSON used by CI to authenticate to GCloud (Cloud Run deploy). Already set as a GitHub secret manually; the script does not re-fan it.

secrets.name: GCLOUD_REGION
secrets.note: Region the fan-out's `gcloud run services update` targets (operator-lane, read from .env directly). NOT an app-runtime payload: the runtime Vertex region comes from VERTEX_LOCATION (config.py), and no app code reads GCLOUD_REGION.

secrets.name: NEON_API_KEY
secrets.note: Neon control-plane API (branching/backups). Operator-only.

secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
secrets.note: Cloudflare control-plane (R2 bucket admin). Operator-only; runtime uses S3_* keys.
